fields.name: Artificial Intelligence
fields.description: Resources related to intelligent systems that simulate human reasoning, learning and decision-making.

fields.name: Large Language Models
fields.description: Resources related to transformer-based language models for text understanding and generation.

fields.name: Prompt Engineering
fields.description: Resources related to designing effective prompts for AI systems and language models.

fields.name: Natural Language Processing
fields.description: Resources related to computational understanding, analysis and generation of human language.

fields.name: Computer Vision
fields.description: Resources related to image recognition, visual perception and computer-based image analysis.

fields.name: Responsible AI
fields.description: Resources related to fairness, transparency, accountability and ethical deployment of artificial intelligence.

fields.name: AI Automation
fields.description: Resources related to automating workflows, business processes and decision support using artificial intelligence.

fields.name: AI Agents
fields.description: Resources related to autonomous AI systems capable of planning, reasoning and performing complex tasks.

fields.name: AI Ethics
fields.description: Resources related to ethical principles, governance and societal implications of artificial intelligence.

fields.name: Intelligent Decision Support
fields.description: Resources related to AI-powered systems that enhance analysis, recommendations and decision-making.
